summary: 2026-06-06 08:03:13 PDT Reviewed `git log --oneline main..HEAD`, `git diff main...HEAD`, and `reviews/camera-overlay-draws-panel.md`. The draw placement now matches the spec, but I found one teardown issue; I did not run test/build commands in the read-only review sandbox.

findings.title: Participant layer is not actually cleared on unmount
findings.claim: `drawCameraOverlay()` draws the base layer with `participantUUID: this._selfUUID`, but `clearCameraOverlay()` calls `clearParticipant` with no options, and `ZOOM_CAPABILITIES` also does not request `clearParticipant`. The story requires the camera instance to clear its own `drawWebView` / `drawParticipant` layers on unmount; as written, the participant base layer will not be reliably cleared before the panel calls `closeRenderingContext()`. Zoom's SDK documents `clearParticipant` as taking the participant identifier: https://appssdk.zoom.us/types/ZoomSdkTypes.ClearParticipantOptions.html
findings.suggestion: Request `clearParticipant` in `ZOOM_CAPABILITIES` and document it in `server/zoom-app-config.md`; in `clearCameraOverlay()`, call `this._sdk.clearParticipant?.({ participantUUID: this._selfUUID })` when `_selfUUID` is present, and add/update tests so the fake SDK asserts that argument.
